Live Demo

Interactive TUI Demo

A faithful replica of the postctl terminal UI. Click the window, then use Tab or ←→ to switch tabs, ↑↓ to navigate, and Enter to interact.

SETTINGS & CONNECTIONS
>AI Provider : claude
>AI Model : claude-3-5-sonnet-latest
>Dry Run : false
>Language : en
>License Type : Core (Free)
PLATFORM ACCOUNTS
>Twitter/X : Connected ✓
>LinkedIn : Connected ✓
>Threads : Connected ✓
>Mastodon : Connected ✓
>Bluesky : Connected ✓
>Facebook : Connected ✓
BACKUP & SYNC
>Backup Exp. : Execute (Press Enter)
>Backup Imp. : Execute (Press Enter)
←/→ / enter: Change / Connect · d: Reset/Disconnect · Saved instantly.
Activate Pro license via CLI: postctl config set license_key <key>
TWITTER/X CONNECTION METHOD
Wähle die Verbindungsmethode für Twitter/X:
> 1) Offizielle API (mit Credits)
> 2) Cookie-basiert (auth_token & ct0)
↑↓: Wählen · enter: Bestätigen · esc: Abbrechen
tab: next tab · ↑↓: navigate · enter: select · n: new · e: edit · i: import · d: delete · r: repurpose · q: quit
f1/R: readme · ?: quick help
Click the window to focus · Tab switches tabs · ↑↓ navigates · Enter to interact
